heading: Immediate payment of fees in limited circumstances
label: 7602 Immediate payment of fees in limited circumstances
text: A prescriber may require payment of fees for an eye examination, fitting, and evaluation before the release of a contact lens prescription, but only if the prescriber requires immediate payment in the case of an examination that reveals no requirement for ophthalmic goods. For purposes of the preceding sentence, presentation of proof of insurance coverage for that service shall be deemed to be a payment.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 60 days after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 6, 2003section 12 of Pub. L. 108–164section 7601 of this title
